qry:define.declare: <EVAL_ASIST descr="[1] AFIANZAMIENTO PROFESIONAL - [15] - [01] 01" f_eval_asist="20071001" oi_inscripto="5" id="1"> <oi_evaluacion value="2" nmd-agr="1" /> <oi_valor nmd-agr="1" /> <FACT_EV_AS nmd-col="1"> <FACT_EV_AS descr="[1] AFIANZAMIENTO PROFESIONAL - [15] - [01] 01 - [01] 01" oi_eval_asist="1" id="1" n_resultado="" o_fact_ev_as=""> <oi_factor_eval value="1" nmd-agr="1" /> <oi_valor nmd-agr="1" value="" /> </FACT_EV_AS> </FACT_EV_AS> </EVAL_ASIST>
qry:define.name: qry_valores

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT CYD14_VALORES.oi_valor, CYD14_VALORES.c_valor, CYD14_VALORES.d_valor FROM CYD14_VALORES, CYD12_EVALUACIONES JOIN CYD14_VALORES.oi_escala INNER CYD12_EVALUACIONES.oi_escala WHERE CYD12_EVALUACIONES.oi_evaluacion = {#SOURCE:oi_evaluacion/@value} ')ROWS/ROW

qry:define.declare: <FILTRO oi_curso="" c_estado="" f_desde="" f_hasta="" ATRIB_ORDEN1="" ORDEN1="" ATRIB_ORDEN2="" ORDEN2="" ATRIB_ORDEN3="" ORDEN3="" ATRIB_ORDEN4="" ORDEN4="" oi_personal_emp=""><DICTADOS><DICTADO id="" /></DICTADOS></FILTRO>
qry:define.name: FILTER

qry:select.name: sql1

qry:define.declare: <FILTRO oi_curso="" c_estado="" f_desde="" f_hasta="" ATRIB_ORDEN1="" ORDEN1="" ATRIB_ORDEN2="" ORDEN2="" ATRIB_ORDEN3="" ORDEN3="" ATRIB_ORDEN4="" ORDEN4="" oi_personal_emp=""><DICTADOS><DICTADO id="" /></DICTADOS></FILTRO>
qry:define.name: LIST

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT t0.oi_dictado as oi_dictado, t0.c_dictado as c_dictado, t0.d_dictado as d_dictado, t0.f_inicio as f_inicio, t0.f_fin as f_fin, t0.n_duracion_hs as n_duracion_hs, t0.c_estado as c_estado, t0.f_estado as f_estado, t0.l_externo as l_externo, t0.d_organizador as d_organizador, t0.e_min_asistencia as e_min_asistencia, t0.e_cupo_min as e_cupo_min, t0.e_cupo_max as e_cupo_max, t0.e_cupo_prev as e_cupo_prev, t0.e_cupo_conv as e_cupo_conv, t0.e_cupo_real as e_cupo_real, t0.c_tipo_asistencia as c_tipo_asistencia, t0.c_dictado as CODE, t0.d_dictado as TEXT, t0.oi_curso as oi_curso, t0.l_evalua as l_evalua, cur.c_curso as c_curso, t0.oi_estructura as oi_estructura, t0.oi_proveedor as oi_proveedor, t0.oi_lugar_dictado as oi_lugar_dictado {%? (#SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp!='') {% ,CYD02_INSCRIPTOS.oi_personal_emp %} {% %} %}
FROM CYD02_DICTADOS as t0, CYD01_CURSOS as cur {%? (#SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp!='') {% ,CYD02_INSCRIPTOS JOIN t0.oi_dictado INNER CYD02_INSCRIPTOS.oi_dictado %} {% %} %} JOIN t0.oi_curso INNER cur.oi_curso WHERE 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@oi_curso!='') {% AND t0.oi_curso = {#SOURCE:@oi_curso} %} {% %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@c_estado!='') {% AND t0.c_estado = {#SOURCE:@c_estado} %} {% %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp!='') {% AND CYD02_INSCRIPTOS.oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp} %} {% %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@f_desde!='') {% AND t0.f_inicio >= {Datetime(#SOURCE:@f_desde)} %} {% %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@f_hasta!='') {% AND t0.f_fin <= {Datetime(#SOURCE:@f_hasta)+1} %} {% %} %} {%? (string(#SOURCE:DICTADOS/DICTADO/@id)!='') {% AND t0.oi_dictado in ({%=string(#SOURCE:DICTADOS/DICTADO/@id) %}) %} {% %} %} ORDER BY {%? (#SOURCE:@ATRIB_ORDEN1!='') {% {%=#SOURCE:@ATRIB_ORDEN1%} {%? (#SOURCE:@ORDEN1!='') {% {%=#SOURCE:@ORDEN1%}, %} {% ASC, %} %} %} {% %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@ATRIB_ORDEN2!='') {% {%=#SOURCE:@ATRIB_ORDEN2%} {%? (#SOURCE:@ORDEN2!='') {% {%=#SOURCE:@ORDEN2%}, %} {% ASC, %} %} %} {% %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@ATRIB_ORDEN3!='') {% {%=#SOURCE:@ATRIB_ORDEN3%} {%? (#SOURCE:@ORDEN3!='') {% {%=#SOURCE:@ORDEN3%}, %} {% ASC, %} %} %} {% %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@ATRIB_ORDEN4!='') {% {%=#SOURCE:@ATRIB_ORDEN4%} {%? (#SOURCE:@ORDEN4!='') {% {%=#SOURCE:@ORDEN4%}, %} {% ASC, %} %} %} {% %} %} oi_dictado ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:define.declare: <EVAL_ASIST descr="Nuevo" nmd-status="~i," f_eval_asist="20080101" n_resultado="" o_eval_asist="" id="~1C041A024CC2-1CE4E38244A4-00000000002A"> <oi_evaluacion nmd-agr="1" value="1" nmd-status="~u,value," /> <oi_valor nmd-agr="1" /> <FACT_EV_AS nmd-col="1"> <FACT_EV_AS descr="Nuevo" nmd-status="~i," id="~1C041A024CC2-1CE4FBEB3816-00000000002B"> <oi_factor_eval nmd-agr="1" /> <oi_valor nmd-agr="1" /> </FACT_EV_AS> </FACT_EV_AS> </EVAL_ASIST>
qry:define.name: qry_valores_fact

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT CYD12_FACTORES_EVAL.oi_escala, CYD12_FACTORES_EVAL.oi_factor_eval FROM CYD12_FACTORES_EVAL WHERE CYD12_FACTORES_EVAL.oi_evaluacion = {#SOURCE:oi_evaluacion/@value} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT CYD14_VALORES.oi_valor, CYD14_VALORES.c_valor, CYD14_VALORES.d_valor FROM CYD14_VALORES WHERE CYD14_VALORES.oi_escala = {#SOURCE:@oi_escala} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT CYD02_INSCRIPTOS.oi_personal_emp, CYD02_INSCRIPTOS.oi_inscripto, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom FROM CYD02_INSCRIPTOS, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN CYD02_INSCRIPTOS.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE CYD02_INSCRIPTOS.oi_dictado = {#SOURCE:@oi_dictado} ORDER BY e_numero_legajo ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql2
